gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Sequence encoding: `bundle( permute^0(items[0]), permute^1(items[1]), … )`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Each item `i` is permuted by shift `i` to protect its position (a positional encoding),"] # [doc = " then the permuted items are bundled.  The guarantee tag is the meet of `bundle`'s tag"] # [doc = " (model-dependent) and `permute`'s tag (`Exact`), which is just the `bundle` tag — see"] # [doc = " `vsa.md §4` row `encode_seq`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " An empty slice is `Err(EmptyBundle)` — the bundle of zero items is undefined (C1 / G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyBundle`] — zero items supplied."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NestedBundleUnsupported`] — a MAP-B input is itself a bundle (RR-13)."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::DimMismatch`] — items have differing lengths."] pub fn encode_seq < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , items : & [& [f64]]) -> Result < Vec < f64 > , VsaError > { if items . is_empty () { return Err (VsaError :: EmptyBundle) ; } let permuted : Vec < Vec < f64 > > = items . iter () . enumerate () . map (| (i , item) | model . permute (item , i as i64)) . collect :: < Result < _ , _ > > () ? ; let refs : Vec < & [f64] > = permuted . iter () . map (Vec :: as_slice) . collect () ; model . bundle (& refs) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound — type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Set encoding: `bundle(items[0], items[1], …)` — superpose atoms without positional encoding."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The guarantee tag equals the model's `bundle` tag (the permute identity is `Exact` and"] # [doc = " contributes nothing to the meet).  Useful for set/bag membership probes where order does not"] # [doc = " matter."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " An empty slice is `Err(EmptyBundle)` (C1 / G2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyBundle`] — zero items supplied."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NestedBundleUnsupported`] — MAP-B nesting (RR-13)."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::DimMismatch`] — items have differing lengths."] # [inline] pub fn encode_set < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , items : & [& [f64]]) -> Result < Vec < f64 > , VsaError > { if items . is_empty () { return Err (VsaError :: EmptyBundle) ; } model . bundle (items) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound — type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment
